title: IMDB Sentiment Analysis
description: Built a sentiment classifier using an LSTM neural network with tokenization and padded batching, optimized with cross-entropy loss.

title: Flower Image Classifier
description: Trained a CNN for multi-class flower classification using PyTorch with GPU acceleration, batch normalization, dropout, and data augmentation.
